title: Here Are Our Predictions in 12 Key 2026 Grammy Races, Including All 6 General Field Categories
text: Billboard provides Grammy predictions across 12 key categories. While the article discusses three rap albums nominated for Album of the Year—Kendrick Lamar's GNX, Tyler, the Creator's CHROMAKOPIA, and Clipse's Let God Sort Em Out—it notes this marks the first time in Grammy history that three rap albums compete in that category. The rap albums showcase the diversity and critical acceptance of hip-hop music within the Recording Academy. Kendrick Lamar's GNX is positioned as the frontrunner across multiple categories based on his commercial success and Grammy history. The analysis notes that the Best Rap Album category features strong competition from Clipse's reunion effort and Tyler's artistic exploration. These nominations reflect the evolving landscape of Grammy recognition for hip-hop artists.
